market_context:
Cohort size: 201 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £154.60
Median 90-day occupancy: 47.8%

analysis.rewritten_desc: Sleek, high-end Georgian home in prime Royal Birkdale proximity. Sleep 4 in lavish comfort, just [insert key location details]. While your £2200 rate exceeds the local median by 1323%, we recommend pairing this premium price point with explicit mentions of [insert key amenities] and [unique differentiators]. Currently achieving 89.1% occupancy against your cohort's 47.8% median is outstanding, but strategic optimization could maximize revenue on your 10 remaining open nights. This property's exceptional 4.92-star rating (72 reviews) demonstrates strong guest satisfaction - let's leverage this while emphasizing [specific luxury features] to maintain premium positioning.
top_amenity_gaps: Streaming TV setup (required for 21st century luxury perception)
analysis.photo_order_rec: Prioritize exterior/front garden photo for cover image to immediately convey £2200+ price justification through architectural grandeur
key_diagnosis: £2200 rate is 1323% above cohort median of £154.60, yet occupancy at 89.1% exceeds category average
Description provides no factual context or luxury amenities to justify extreme price point
Zero listed amenities make high-end appeal incoherent for potential bookers
analysis.outreach_hook: Your £2,200 rate is +1323% vs cohort median, but only 10 open nights remain in next 90 days - what's limiting full capacity?
